prompt: We're using GitLab and I noticed VlamGuard doesn't have any checks for Crossplane CRDs. I'd like to request that as a feature — things like composition validation, provider config checks, that sort of thing.

assertions.name: correct_cli
assertions.description: References 'glab issue create', not 'gh issue create'

assertions.name: crossplane_detail
assertions.description: Mentions Crossplane CRDs and specific features like composition validation
